case_title: CHINATOWN RESTAURANT VS PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY (PG&E)

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY (PG&E)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,900.00 FILED BY CHINATOWN RESTAURANT AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY (PG&E) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-01-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHINATOWN RESTAURANT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY (PG&E) $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,550.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
